label: general-purpose CPU
note: runs any op-class in software — no accelerator op-graph to fall outside of; the honest floor: everything fits, everything is slow. The baseline a fixed-function NPU must beat to be worth the integration cost.

instances.name: rpi5_cortex_a76
instances.label: Raspberry Pi 5 (Cortex-A76 x4 @ 2.4 GHz)
instances.ext_memory: system LPDDR4X-4267 (shared; 1/2/4/8/16 GiB options, 8 GiB shown)
instances.sources: S15 (Cortex-A76, no int8 TOPS spec), S16 (LPDDR4X options)
instances.note: no NPU; a Cortex-A76 has no published int8 TOPS spec, and a roofline number would be misleading for a scalar/NEON CPU, so latency is left unprojected. The reference no-accelerator target.
